summary: 11 countries. The renewed US-Iran war over the Strait of Hormuz dominates coverage, with fresh US strikes, a reimposed naval blockade and Iranian attacks on Gulf states. Trump's reversal on halting ICE traffic stops and a White House move to release intelligence on China also travel abroad.
11 countries. The US-Iran clash over the Strait of Hormuz, a renewed naval blockade and fresh strikes dominate world coverage. A US Supreme Court ruling against Trump's tariffs also lands abroad.
9 countries · Iran strikes & Hormuz blockade dominate world coverage · US 250th anniversary
